scenario.name: Generalizing Falsified Invariant (The Hard Push)
scenario.prior_wake_pack: The user reported that the workspace ledger tool fails with an error on large inputs. We are investigating.

active_invariants.text: The ledger tool previously failed when given a large input due to a potential serialization error.

thread_history.content: Hey, I figured out why the ledger tool was failing! It wasn't the serialization. The underlying SQLite wrapper just flat out crashes if a single query exceeds 5MB. So it's a hard limit on query size, not a serialization bug.

scenario.name: Extracting Physics over History
scenario.prior_wake_pack: Starting a new debugging session on the authentication flow.

thread_history.content: Wow, okay I just spent 2 hours debugging. It turns out the Redis cache we use for auth tokens drops entries after 15 minutes silently without respecting the TTL field we pass it. I filed a bug but for now we have to assume tokens expire after 15m.

    }

scenario.name: Segregating Transient Preferences and Policies
scenario.prior_wake_pack: Working on the UI components for the new CRM project.

thread_history.content: We need to make sure all of the primary call-to-action buttons in this project are vibrant blue. Also, whenever you write React components, use functional components with hooks. Don't use class components. I really prefer clean, minimal code without too many comments unless the logic is super weird.

scenario.name: Empty Patch for Non-Reality Altering Chat
scenario.prior_wake_pack: The user is configuring their local development environment. Current operating system is macOS.

active_invariants.text: The host operating system is macOS.

thread_history.content: Can you remind me what the command is to zip a folder?
You can use `zip -r archive_name.zip folder_name/` to recursively zip a folder in macOS.
Thanks, that worked perfectly! Just uploading it now.
